cau_hoi: ________ of the committee I’d like to thank you for your generous donation.
giai_thich: On behalf of + N: Thay mặt cho. A: thay vì, C: Theo như, D: Mặc dù.

cau_hoi: ________, I decided to stop trading with them.
A: Despite of the fact that they were the biggest dealer
D: Even though they were the biggest dealer
giai_thich: Cấu trúc tương phản đối lập: (Even) though S V O. Loại A vì sai cấu trúc (Despite the fact that), loại B và C không phù hợp ngữ pháp.

cau_hoi: I think it’s ________ to take a few more pictures.
giai_thich: Cấu trúc: tính từ + enough + to V (đủ... để làm gì).

cau_hoi: ________ I heard the phone ring I didn’t answer it.
giai_thich: Mặc dù tôi nghe thấy tiếng chuông điện thoại reo nhưng tôi không trả lời.

cau_hoi: Determining the mineral content of soil samples is an exacting process; ________, experts must perform detail tests to analyze soil specimens.
giai_thich: therefore: do đó, vì vậy. Phù hợp để nối hai vế có quan hệ nguyên nhân - kết quả.

cau_hoi: Businesses will not survive ________ they satisfy their customers.
giai_thich: unless = if not: trừ khi. Các doanh nghiệp sẽ không tồn tại trừ phi họ thoả mãn khách hàng.

cau_hoi: This investigation is not only one that is continuing and worldwide ________ we expect to continue for quite some time.
giai_thich: Cấu trúc "not only... but also...": không những ... mà còn...

cau_hoi: A few natural elements exist in ________ that they are rarely seen in their natural environments.
giai_thich: Such + N + that: quá ... đến nỗi mà. "Quantities" là danh từ nên dùng such.

cau_hoi: He decided to quit the job ________ the high salary he got.
giai_thich: Despite + cụm danh từ. "The high salary" là cụm danh từ.

cau_hoi: I will stand here and wait for you ________ you come back.
giai_thich: until: mãi đến khi. Chờ cho đến khi em quay lại.

cau_hoi: My sister won’t go to the party tonight and ________.
giai_thich: Diễn đạt "ai đó cũng không" dùng: Neither + trợ từ + S.

cau_hoi: When he came to the counter of pay, he found that he had ________ cash ________ his credit card with him.
giai_thich: Neither ... nor ...: không cái này cũng không cái kia.

cau_hoi: ________ we understand his reasons we cannot accept his behaviour.
giai_thich: Even if: kể cả (như thế), dù. Dịch: Dù chúng ta hiểu lý do, chúng ta vẫn không chấp nhận hành vi đó.

cau_hoi: ________ his poor English he managed to communicate his problem very clearly.
giai_thich: In spite of + cụm danh từ: mặc dù. "His poor English" là cụm danh từ.

cau_hoi: Neither the students nor their lecturer ________ English in the classroom.
giai_thich: Cấu trúc Neither S1 nor S2: động từ chia theo S2 (their lecturer - số ít).

cau_hoi: ________ the price is high we can’t afford to buy a new car.
giai_thich: Now that + S + V: Vì/Giờ đây khi mà. Chỉ nguyên nhân.

cau_hoi: He hurried ________ he wouldn’t be late for class.
giai_thich: so that + mệnh đề: để mà (chỉ mục đích).

cau_hoi: I’m sorry you’ve decided not to go with us on the river trip, but ________ you change your mind, there will still be enough room on the boat for you.
giai_thich: in the event that + S + V: trong trường hợp. Phù hợp ngữ cảnh đề bài.

cau_hoi: ________ you read the instructions carefully you will understand what to do.
giai_thich: Provided that + S + V: Với điều kiện là / Miễn là.

cau_hoi: My father is getting old and forgetful. ________ he is experienced and helpful.
giai_thich: Be that as it may: Mặc dù như thế. Dùng để chỉ sự nhượng bộ.

cau_hoi: We've had ________ problems with our new computer that we had to send it back to the shop.
giai_thich: Such + N + that: quá đến nỗi mà. "Problems" là danh từ.

cau_hoi: The baby can't even sit up yet ________ stand and walk!
giai_thich: let alone: chứ đừng nói đến, huống chi là.

cau_hoi: All the candidates for the scholarship will be equally treated ________ of their sex age or nationality.
giai_thich: regardless of: bất kể, bất chấp cái gì.

cau_hoi: Don't be late for the interview, ________ people will think you are a disorganized person.
giai_thich: otherwise: nếu không thì/hoặc là.

cau_hoi: You should take regular exercise ________ sitting in front of the television all day.
giai_thich: instead of: thay vì.

cau_hoi: High-level sport people must maintain a high level of fitness ________ run the risk of suffering injuries that cause permanent damage.
giai_thich: or else: nếu không thì/hoặc là.

cau_hoi: ________ irritating they are you shouldn't lose temper with small children.
giai_thich: However + adj + S + V: dù ... thế nào đi nữa.
